instruction: What is the total web revenue by product category in Q1 of 2001?
context: The digital commerce team needs quarterly product category-level web revenue breakdown to plan seasonal content and promotional campaigns.
required_metrics_kpis: Quarterly Web Revenue by Item Attribute

aggregation_logic.Quarterly Web Revenue by Item Attribute: SUM(CAST(ws_net_paid AS DECIMAL)) grouped by product category, filtered to year=2001 quarter=1

chain_of_thought: Use web_sales as the fact table for online channel revenue.
Join to item to access the product category product hierarchy.
Join to date_dim and filter WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_qoy = 1.
Aggregate web revenue with SUM after casting to DECIMAL.
Group by product category and order by total revenue descending.

data_model.hierarchies: Date > Quarter > Year, Product > Product Category

sql:
SELECT
  i.i_category AS i_category,
  SUM(CAST(ws.ws_net_paid AS DECIMAL(15,2))) AS total_web_revenue
FROM web_sales ws
JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_qoy = 1
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY total_web_revenue DESC;
